CVE-2018-7999.title: In libgraphite2 in graphite2 1.3.11, a NULL pointer dereference v ...
CVE-2018-7999.description: In libgraphite2 in graphite2 1.3.11, a NULL pointer dereference vulnerability was found in Segment.cpp during a dumbRendering operation, which may allow attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted .ttf file.
